query: SELECT DISTINCT movementType, COUNT(*) as cantidad FROM payments GROUP BY movementType
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT DISTINCT movementType, COUNT(*) as cantidad FROM payments GROUP BY movementType
